finding: The effective queue must be derived from the canonical snapshot plus append-only projections, with field-level provenance and explicit unresolved conflicts.

observed: The canonical queue snapshot predates later continuity queue projections.
M-002 and M-003 are represented in append-only projection records rather than the canonical snapshot.
inferred: Queue selection based only on the canonical snapshot can duplicate completed work or miss newer state.
proposed: All teams should run the reducer before selecting work after runtime verification is retained.
superseded: Treating operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json alone as the complete current queue.
unresolved: The reducer has not yet been executed in a retained clean runtime during this run.
No shared authority is yet declared for refreshing operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json.

verification.reason: The available connector supported repository writes and reads but did not expose a code-execution action in this run.

falsification_route: Run node --test tools/continuity/effective-queue.test.mjs in a clean checkout. The design is falsified if later projections are not selected deterministically, source records are mutated, field provenance is lost, or equal-time contradictory projections are silently collapsed.
